title: Deterministic reconciliation safety
description: An approved statement row is authoritative over earlier agent-capture evidence for current canonical facts, but automatic reconciliation or correction is permitted only when documented compatible evidence produces one strong deterministic candidate. Zero candidates may create one Statement-only Transaction through an approved INGEST request; multiple or conflicting candidates remain unapplied. Owner-confirmed match or correction requires explicit intent, reason, and evidence. No active statement evidence may confirm more than one active transaction.
